seoTitle: Blakehurst vs Bland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Blakehurst and Bland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Blakehurst and Bland.
heading: Blakehurst vs Bland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blakehurst, New South Wales and Bland, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bland has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Blakehurst (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blakehurst or Bland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blakehurst has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Bland scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blakehurst scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Bland scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blakehurst or Bland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bland has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
